landing.heroSubheadline: Upload documents, paste URLs, or type your notes — or simply name your topic and let the AI do the rest. Our AI instantly generates smart flashcards that you can study anytime, anywhere.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Learn Effectively
landing.featuresSubtitle: From raw material to mastered knowledge — all in one place.
landing.feature1Desc: PDFs, Word documents, plain text, web pages, or YouTube videos — we handle them all and extract the key content.
landing.feature2Desc: Our AI reads your source material and produces concise question-and-answer flashcards tailored to the topic.
landing.feature3Desc: Flip through your flashcards, reveal the answer, and work your way through the full deck at your own pace.
landing.feature4Desc: Access your flashcard decks directly inside Telegram — no app install required, study anywhere anytime.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps from source to mastery.
landing.step1Desc: Give your deck a name — for example "Spanish Vocabulary" or "React Hooks" — and choose the language for your cards.
landing.step2Desc: Sources are optional. You can upload a PDF or DOCX, paste a URL, drop in a YouTube link, or type your notes — or skip this step entirely and let the AI generate cards straight from your theme name and description.
landing.step3Desc: Start a study session. Flip through your AI-generated cards, reveal the answers, and work through the deck at your own pace. Pick up where you left off any time.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free and upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees.
landing.faqSubtitle: Still have questions? Reach out to us anytime.
landing.faq1Question: What types of files can I upload?
landing.faq1Answer: Sources are entirely optional. You can upload PDF and DOCX files up to 4.5 MB, paste raw text, add a web page URL, or link a YouTube video. Alternatively, you can skip sources altogether — the AI will generate cards purely from your theme name and description. Mix and match as you like.
landing.faq2Question: How does the AI generate flashcards?
landing.faq2Answer: We send your source content to a large language model with instructions to extract key question-answer pairs. The model returns structured cards which are stored in your account.
landing.faq3Answer: Your uploaded content and generated cards are private by default. You can optionally make a theme public to share it with the community. We never sell your data. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
landing.faq4Question: Can I use it on my phone?
landing.faq4Answer: Yes. The web app is fully responsive. You can also access your decks directly via our Telegram bot — no extra app to install.
landing.faq5Question: How do I get more cards?
landing.faq5Answer: Card generation is limited by your plan tier. Upgrade your tier to generate more cards.

privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Clario ("we", "our", or "us") collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our service at clario.app.
privacy.section1Body: When you register, we collect your email address and optional display name. If you authenticate via Telegram, we receive your Telegram user ID and username. When you upload source material (documents, URLs, text), that content is processed to generate flashcards and then stored in our database. We also store the flashcards generated on your behalf, your study-session progress, and streak data.
privacy.section2Body: We use your information to provide and improve the service: authenticating your account, generating flashcards using AI providers, displaying your learning progress, and sending transactional emails (e.g. magic-link sign-in). We do not use your data for advertising and we never sell it to third parties.
privacy.section3Body: Source content you upload may be sent to third-party AI providers (such as Groq, Google Gemini, OpenAI, or Anthropic) to generate flashcard content. These providers process the text transiently and do not store it for training purposes under our agreements. Please review each provider's own privacy policy if you have concerns about specific content.
privacy.section4Body: Your data is stored in Supabase (PostgreSQL) hosted on secure cloud infrastructure. We use industry-standard encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. Access to production data is restricted to authorised personnel only.
privacy.section5Body: We use two cookies: a session cookie (next-auth.session-token) required to keep you logged in, and a locale preference cookie (NEXT_LOCALE) that remembers your chosen interface language. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.
privacy.section6Body: We rely on the following third-party services: Supabase (database & auth), Vercel (hosting), Groq / Google Gemini / OpenAI / Anthropic (AI generation), and optionally Telegram (bot access). Each service has its own privacy policy which governs how they handle data.
privacy.section7Body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. You can delete your account at any time from the Settings page. Upon deletion, all your themes, flashcards, source material, and usage data are permanently removed from our systems within 30 days.
privacy.section8Body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data, or to request a copy of it. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at the email address below.
privacy.section9Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or an in-app notice. The "last updated" date at the top of this page will always reflect the most recent version.
privacy.section10Body: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using Clario. By creating an account or using the service, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.section1Body: These Terms of Service ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Clario. If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the service.
terms.section2Body: Clario is an AI-powered flashcard generation and study platform. You can upload source material (documents, URLs, or text), have AI generate flashcards from that material, and study those cards in interactive sessions. The service is available via a web app and a Telegram bot integration.
terms.section3Body: You must provide a valid email address to register. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. You must be at least 13 years of age to use the service.
terms.section4Body: You agree not to upload content that is illegal, harmful, defamatory, infringing, or that violates any third-party rights. You agree not to attempt to circumvent subscription limits, reverse-engineer the AI generation pipeline, or use the service to generate content at scale for redistribution. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these rules.
terms.section5Body: The service is available on a Free plan (50 generated cards per month, up to 5 themes) and paid plans: Starter at ~200 Stars/mo for 300 cards and up to 20 themes, Pro at ~500 Stars/mo for 2,000 cards with unlimited themes, and Max at ~1,000 Stars/mo for 5,000 cards with unlimited themes. Quotas reset on a rolling 30-day basis from your subscription start date. Plans are purchased via Telegram Stars inside the Telegram app. There are no automatic renewals; your plan expires after one month unless renewed manually.
terms.section6Body: You retain ownership of all content you upload. By uploading content, you grant us a limited licence to process it for the purpose of generating flashcards on your behalf. The flashcards generated are associated with your account and considered your content. Our platform, code, logo, and branding remain the intellectual property of Clario.
terms.section7Body: Flashcards are generated by AI models and may contain inaccuracies. We do not warrant the accuracy, completeness, or fitness for purpose of any AI-generated content. Always verify important information from authoritative sources.
terms.section8Body: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free from harmful components.
terms.section9Body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of the service, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.section10Body: We may suspend or terminate your access to the service at any time for violation of these Terms. You may close your account at any time from the Settings page. Upon termination, your data will be deleted as described in our Privacy Policy.
terms.section11Body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notice. Continued use of the service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.section12Body: These Terms are governed by applicable law. Disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation first, and failing that, through binding arbitration or courts of competent jurisdiction.
terms.section13Body: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
